rationale.R1.4: The related-work section names three plausible neighbors but treats each as a foil rather than a genuine point of comparison; the differentiation rests on assertions rather than identified prior systems, and at least one adjacent literature is missing.
rationale.RX.1: The passage refers to 'continuous-batching schedulers and paged KV-cache managers,' 'DAG schedulers, durable-execution frameworks, and serverless step functions,' and 'gRPC-style frameworks and service meshes,' but never names a representative system in any category.
rationale.RX.3: A directly adjacent body of work is missing: agent frameworks and agent-serving research.
rationale.RX.4: The dismissals are too sweeping and risk overclaim.
